question: Radio frequency identifier (RFID)
canonical_answer: A wireless system comprised of two components: tags and readers .Tags, which use radio waves to communicate their identity and other information to nearby readers, can be passive or active.

appears_in.title: Comptia Exam Objectives Security+
appears_in.answer: A wireless system comprised of two components: tags and readers .Tags, which use radio waves to communicate their identity and other information to nearby readers, can be passive or active.

appears_in.title: Comptia Sec Plus Objectives
appears_in.answer: A set of standards primarily for smartphones and smart cards that can be used to establish communication between devices in close proximity.
